heading: cyThe defendant’s situation
accommodationQuestion: cyWould the defendant have somewhere else to live if they had to leave their home?
dateLabel: cyWhen would they be able to move in? (Optional)

date.notRealDate: cyThe date the defendant would be able to move in must be a real date
date.pastDate: cyThe date the defendant would be able to move in must be in the future
date.invalidValue: cyThe date the defendant would be able to move in must be a real date
date.missingOne: cyThe date the defendant would be able to move in must include a {{missingField}}
date.missingTwo: cyThe date the defendant would be able to move in must include a {{first}} and {{second}}

errors.confirmAlternativeAccommodation: cySelect if the defendant would have somewhere else to live if they had to leave their home
